source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A small pump is driven by a 2-kW motor with liquid water at 150 kPa, 10\circ\text{C} entering. The exit flow goes through a small hole in a spray nozzle out to the atmosphere at 100 kPa. Find the spray velocity.
